name: MyDb
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the MyDb service and basic metadata extraction.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the service and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to MyDb, please validate the credentials

steps.name: GetSchemas
steps.description: List all the schemas available to the user.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to list all the schemas available to the user.

steps.name: GetTables
steps.description: From a given schema, list the tables belonging to that schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to from a given schema, list the tables belonging to that schema.

steps.name: GetViews
steps.description: From a given schema, list the views belonging to that schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to from a given schema, list the views belonging to that schema.
